name: Ocal Browser V7.7.04
body:
OCAL BROWSER - STABLE RELEASE CATALOG
Version: 7.7.04
Release Date: July 16, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[INNO SETUP STABLE BUILD]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* CUSTOM INSTALLER/UNINSTALLER REMOVAL: Fully removed the old custom JavaScript/HTML based installer and uninstaller in favor of relying exclusively on the native Inno Setup package for better stability and OS integration.
* ICON EMBEDDING FIX: Retained rcedit post-processing step to stamp custom Ocal icon.ico directly into the Windows executable, resolving the persistent Electron default icon in the taskbar.
* ELECTRON BRANDING REMOVAL: Excluded LICENSE.electron.txt and LICENSES.chromium.html from installer to eliminate all visible Electron references.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[PRODUCT STABILITY & USER EXPERIENCE]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* STABLE CHANNEL RELEASE: Promoted the browser to stable 7.7.04, focused on taskbar icon correctness and clean installation experience.
* INSTALLER CLEANUP: Removed `--install` and `--uninstall-survey` logic from main process to reduce footprint.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[FEATURE HIGHLIGHTS]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* INTEGRATED MEDIA MASTER: Better media popup handling with explicit browser view cleanup and faster UI response for video downloads.
* MULTITASKING EXPERIENCE: Stabilized side-by-side split browsing and overlay ordering for sidebar and web app panels.
* SECURITY & PRIVACY: Reinforced custom protocol reveals.
